message:
feat(charmed): major expansion across bubbletea, glamour, harmonica, and huh crates

Comprehensive improvements to the Charmed TUI framework, enhancing the
Elm-architecture implementation, adding markdown rendering capabilities,
expanding physics simulation, and improving form handling.

## Bubbletea - Elm Architecture (crates/bubbletea/)
### Program Runtime (src/program.rs) [+236 lines]
- Enhanced program lifecycle management with graceful shutdown
- Added subscription system for external event sources
- Implemented command batching for reduced render cycles
- Added middleware support for logging and debugging
- Improved error boundary handling with recovery strategies

### Property Tests (tests/property_tests.rs) [NEW]
- Added property-based tests for message handling
- Implemented state transition verification
- Added model invariant checking

## Glamour - Markdown Rendering (crates/glamour/)
### Library Core (src/lib.rs) [+268 lines]
- Enhanced markdown parsing with CommonMark compliance
- Added syntax highlighting for code blocks (50+ languages)
- Implemented custom renderer hooks for extensibility
- Added image placeholder rendering with dimensions
- Improved link handling with hover styles

### Table Rendering (src/table.rs) [+519 lines]
- Implemented full GFM table support with alignment
- Added configurable column width strategies
- Implemented row striping and borders
- Added cell padding and margin control
- Improved Unicode box-drawing character selection

### Test Suite (tests/) [NEW]
- Added comprehensive markdown rendering tests
- Implemented table rendering verification
- Added syntax highlighting output tests

## Harmonica - Physics Simulation (crates/harmonica/)
### Projectile Motion (src/projectile.rs) [+16 lines]
- Refined trajectory calculations
- Improved numerical stability

### Spring Physics (src/spring.rs) [+49 lines]
- Enhanced spring damping models
- Added critical damping detection
- Improved convergence behavior

### Property Tests (tests/, proptest-regressions/) [NEW]
- Added physics simulation property tests
- Implemented numerical stability verification

## Huh - Form Components (crates/huh/)
### Library Core (src/lib.rs) [+306 lines]
- Expanded input field types (text, number, date, select, multiselect)
- Added validation integration with error display
- Implemented focus management between fields
- Added keyboard navigation (tab, shift+tab, arrows)
- Improved accessibility with screen reader hints

## Demo Showcase (crates/demo_showcase/)
### Shell Actions (src/shell_action.rs) [+303 lines]
- Added interactive shell command demos
- Implemented progress indicator examples
- Added form submission demonstrations

## Logging (crates/charmed_log/)
### Formatting Tests (tests/formatting_tests.rs) [NEW]
- Added log output formatting verification
- Implemented color output tests

Also updates Cargo.lock and syncs beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,13 +20,17 @@ tokio = { version = "1", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "sync", "time", "macros"
 tokio-util = { version = "0.7", features = ["rt"], optional = true }
 futures = { version = "0.3", optional = true }
 
+# Thread pool for batch commands (optional)
+rayon = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+
 # Optional: derive macros for Model trait
 bubbletea-macros = { path = "../bubbletea-macros", optional = true }
 
 [features]
 default = ["macros"]
 macros = ["dep:bubbletea-macros"]
 async = ["dep:tokio", "dep:tokio-util", "dep:futures"]
+thread-pool = ["dep:rayon"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 criterion.workspace = true

@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ description = "Stylesheet-based markdown rendering for terminal applications"
 [dependencies]
 lipgloss = { path = "../lipgloss" }
 pulldown-cmark = "0.13"
+tracing.workspace = true
 unicode-width = "0.1"
 
 # Optional: syntax highlighting
@@ -32,6 +33,8 @@ serde = ["dep:serde"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 criterion.workspace = true
+lipgloss = { path = "../lipgloss" }
+proptest.workspace = true
 stats_alloc = "0.1.10"
 
 [[bench]]

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc e8ca2a658d04c067bbaff5f7ffa2cbc697f75e13b9e65418f3d92a088d3c09ca # shrinks to angular_freq = 0.5, damping_ratio = 0.1, target = 126.80099781334927
+cc f4cf01bc27a0aa89a7263096476c47fbd2f421c8395dd1716ec0e810fe66c4ac # shrinks to angular_freq = 1.0, damping_ratio = 8.564097053483911, target = 421.55969539662294
+cc 840f9f1c5897a3952c12578634c14034217124f5c822e4e7f14bb11579b346ac # shrinks to angular_freq = 17.38292040717129, damping_ratio = 9.534402438061298, target = 496.3919436787268
+cc 3bdc32ae0a18e279a9413784ed520369387e1cae7c88d17dddeddb88735f418d # shrinks to angular_freq = 4.140209453271159, damping_ratio = 0.2, target = -498.04563895111255
